query:
SELECT p.id AS pdi_id, p.createdBy
FROM pdis p
JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN pdi_validacoes pv ON pv.pdiId = p.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider' AND pv.id IS NULL
LIMIT 5;
